evidence: 5635: LXI HL,7001; index is VV62*2; 558D loads the selected pointer.
notes: Two little-endian pointers select the normal timing record bases at 0x7005 and 0x7088.

evidence: 570F: LXI HL,7005; 55B1 reads a record head byte into VV4D and copies the following 0x17 bytes into EF49..EF5F.
notes: Table header is 05 04; first 0x18-byte record starts at 0x700F. Selected when VV62=0 for the paper-feed timing path; overlaps the 0x7007 jump table bytes. Parsed fields are mirrored in lq500_3c_mechanism_timing_records.tsv.

evidence: 545E: LXI EA,7007; 5466/5468 index and JEA through the table.
notes: Four targets: 0x546A, 0x5474, 0x547E, 0x5488. These write PA/PB phase-output states.

evidence: Pointer table at 0x7001 selects 0x7088 when VV62 chooses the alternate record set; 55B1 uses the same head-byte plus EF49..EF5F copy format.

evidence: Record setup around 0x55B1 copies selected table records and later timing setup uses nearby words.
